snov_prison.updateNotes: Fixed some bugs, more robust item confiscation and more configurables

snov_stretcher.updateNotes: Small Bugfix regarding stretcher load/unload due to Vehicle Flags

snov_cuffs.updateNotes: complete rework of interaction system, added unconscious check for search

snov_sperrzone.updateNotes: automatic npc clearing & type specific zones

snov_jobs.updateNotes: Banking integration (cash safe + has_bank_account toggle), SLV theme system, drag-and-drop rank reorder in admin, customizable rank 0 on job creation

snov_farming.updateNotes: Cayo Perico support, clearer processing/save error messages, corrected blip colors, sensible processor/zone defaults, enforced recipe level requirement, skill UI fixes, simpler recipe naming, per-recipe processing time falls back to the processor

snov_mdt.updateNotes: Welcome/onboarding screen now on the tablet (German greeting, badge numbers from #1001), typing animation at stationary terminals; fixes: brand-new profile lookup crash and civilian OG-plate audit-log noise
